blended.narrative: White Pass is looking at a significant storm over the next 48 hours, with 24 inches of snowfall of light, fluffy snow expected. Snow levels around 1,736 ft. Looking ahead, 64 inches possible over the next 14 days.

Thursday: 16" of heavy snow, highs of 34°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

Saturday: 6" of snow, highs of 33°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: 5.2" of new snow over the past week. Base has been melting — down 3" over the past week. Current depth: 49".
